name: Brunch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Thaw and drain.
1. In a skillet, lightly brown the ground beef and onion in olive oil or butter until well cooked. Drain any excess fat.
2. Transfer to a well-greased casserole dish.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except eggs, milk, and cheese) until well blended.
4. Beat together the eggs and scalded milk.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the other ingredients in the casserole dish, stirring gently to combine.
6. Sprinkle with additional nutmeg if desired.
7. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 10 hours or until firm.
8. Just before serving, sprinkle with grated cheese.
